title: Abrams ComicArts' Kana Licenses Satoshi Morie's 'My Dear, A Mystery For You' Manga
content: Abrams ComicArts ' Kana imprint announced on Monday that it has licensed Satoshi Morie 's My Dear, A Mystery For You ( Shinai naru A-jō e no Mystery ) manga, and will release the first volume in May 2027.
author: ANN

title: My Hero Academia Concert World Tour Announces U.S. Tour Dates
content: TOHO , GEA Live, and RoadCo Entertainment announced on Tuesday the U.S. tour dates for the " My Hero Academia in Concert" world tour , featuring composer Yūki Hayashi and scenes from the anime. The U.S. leg of the tour begins on September 12 and ends on October 25. The full list of U.S.
author: ANN

title: Netflix Streams Akane-banashi Anime With English Dub/Sub on May 17
content: The anime began airing on TV Asahi 's "IMAnimation" programming block on April 4. The anime also has its own " Akane-banashi Global" YouTube channel , where full episodes stream for free in North America and Latin America, after their television broadcast in Japan.
author: ANN

title: Godzilla’s Best Movie is Returning to Theaters
content: Godzilla Minus Zero is roaring its way into theaters later this year, continuing the story of one of the scariest takes on the King of the Monsters to date. Set to bring back both the lizard king and the humans that fought against him in the sequel’s predecessor, the sequel will see director Takashi Yamazaki once…
author: ComicBook

title: Kodansha House, Anime Expo Host Blue Lock, Witch Hat Atelier Manga Creators
content: Kaneshiro and Nomura launched the Blue Lock soccer manga in Weekly Shōnen Magazine in August 2018. The original manga inspired a television anime series that premiered in Japan in October 2022 on TV Asahi and its affiliates in the NUMAnimation programming block. The anime ran for 24 episodes.
author: ANN

title: Live-Action Chainsaw Man Adaptation Shares Major Update With New Trailer
content: Chainsaw Man’s manga ended earlier this year, giving Denji and his world a controversial finale that fans are still debating today. Luckily, while creator Tatsuki Fujimoto is leaving the devil-filled world behind, there are still plenty of projects in the works for the bloody shonen series.
author: ComicBook

title: My Hero Academia in Concert Is Coming to the USA
content: Toho Co., Ltd., GEA Live, and RoadCo Entertainment announced the U.S. tour dates for My Hero Academia in Concert , an all new live music experience bringing the score of the iconic shonen series to the stage. This follows an initial European tour announcement in December 2025.
author: Anime Corner

title: New Devil May Cry Season 2 Trailer Shares Fresh Look at Classic Villains
content: Netflix has seen significant success in adapting beloved video game franchises into animated series, with producer Adi Shankar a major reason for the streaming platform’s track record. Following the recent introduction of Dante in Devil May Cry season one, the Capcom demon hunter is returning on May 12th.
author: ComicBook

title: Ryuya Suzuki's Debut Feature Anime Film Jinsei Reveals English-Subtitled Trailer, June 5 U.S. Debut
content: Greenwich Entertainment revealed an English-subtitled video and a poster on Tuesday for Jinsei ( Mumei no Jinsei ), the first feature anime film from independent anime director Ryūya Suzuki . Greenwich Entertainment will screen the film in New York theaters on June 5, before a nationwide release on June 12.
author: ANN

title: Animated Devil May Cry Show's 2nd Season Unveils New Trailer, Key Art
content: Netflix unveiled a new trailer and key art for the second season of the animated series of CAPCOM 's Devil May Cry video game franchise on Tuesday. The second season will premiere on May 12. The first season from Studio Mir premiered in April 2025 with eight episodes featuring the characters Dante, Vergil, and Lady.
author: ANN
